name: Stack Overflow
description: Have Stack Overflow answers read aloud while you follow the code or step through a solution.
metaDescription: Listen to Stack Overflow answers with Voq — free text-to-speech Chrome extension. Great for long technical explanations.
steps: Install Voq from the Chrome Web Store — it is free with no account needed.
Open any Stack Overflow question page.
Select the answer text or explanation you want to hear.
Click the Voq toolbar icon or right-click and choose 'Read with Voq'.
Voq reads the selected text aloud in its reading panel.
Follow along with word highlighting while you look at the code examples.
